featureName: BUG-029-008 locally-built images stamp SMACKEREL_COMMIT=unknown (no source-SHA provenance)
title: Locally-built (local-operator/<deploy-host>) images stamp SMACKEREL_COMMIT=unknown; git-derive the source SHA in the SST generator so the image is self-identifying

parentContext.mechanism: git-working-tree derivation (git rev-parse --short=12 HEAD, -dirty on a dirty tree, unknown fallback outside a git checkout), gated by [[ -z "${SMACKEREL_COMMIT+set}" ]] so a CI export wins
parentContext.liveProofOfRecord: redteam observed live <deploy-host> core+ml images carrying org.opencontainers.image.revision=unknown and core SMACKEREL_COMMIT=unknown (app commit_hash=unknown); this-session unit proof: unset => dev.env SMACKEREL_COMMIT=1bfd18a0f357 (real HEAD SHA), exported sentinel cafef00dba11 preserved

scopeSummary.title: Git-derive SMACKEREL_COMMIT for local-operator builds (fail-safe, CI-precedence-preserving)
scopeSummary.notes: Reconciled/certified 2026-07-19. Effective fix committed in 0f2fb517 (git-working-tree derivation of SMACKEREL_COMMIT in scripts/commands/config.sh + the config-generator regression + Go driver); the git-derivation arm (config.sh:2213-2221) is git-verified present at HEAD 1bfd18a0f357. All 15 DoD items marked [x] with fresh current-session evidence: provenance unit lane GREEN via ./smackerel.sh test unit --go --go-run TestSSTLoader_BuildCommitProvenance_BUG029008 (Sub-test 1 emitted the real HEAD SHA 1bfd18a0f357, Sub-test 2 preserved sentinel cafef00dba11, ok internal/config, UNIT_GO_EXIT=0), regression-quality-guard --bugfix adversarial signal 0 violations (RQG_EXIT=0), check clean (CHECK_EXIT=0), lint clean (LINT_EXIT=0), format --check names only the pre-existing unrelated internal/config/release_trains_contract_test.go (outside this bug's change boundary, untouched). The live 'running images self-identify' DoD item is certified on the committed redteam live proof-of-record (live images carried revision=unknown pre-fix) plus the unit-proven derivation; a fresh config generate + image rebuild + signed redeploy + docker inspect re-check is routed to bubbles.devops as non-gating (redeployRequired). Full 8-phase bugfix-fastlane pipeline parent-expanded this session. Source verified READ-ONLY, NOT re-changed. Scope-Kind: contract-only (config-generator regression; no in-repo live E2E surface for a config-generate value).

executionHistory.note: Created the bug packet from the redteam adversarial interrogation of the live smackerel prod deployment (finding F6). Root cause: scripts/commands/config.sh had no git-working-tree source for SMACKEREL_COMMIT, so the local-operator build path fell through to the literal 'unknown'. Implemented the git-derivation arm (git rev-parse --short=12 HEAD, -dirty suffix, unknown fallback outside a git checkout) preserving CI shell-env precedence, plus the config-generator regression test (Sub-test 1 unset => real SHA; Sub-test 2 exported => preserved) and its Go driver. Committed in 0f2fb517.

executionHistory.note: Fail-safe best-effort provenance, gated by [[ -z "${SMACKEREL_COMMIT+set}" ]] so a CI export always wins, with an unknown fallback outside a git checkout so config generation is never blocked. check confirms config in sync with SST, so runtime stability is unchanged at HEAD.

executionHistory.expansionReason: runSubagent unavailable in this runtime; bubbles.workflow parent-expanded the bubbles.security phase owner directly in-session per the smackerel precedent.
executionHistory.note: The fix touches only the SST config-generator build-metadata resolution and its regression test; it adds no skip/force/insecure path, changes no secret/credential material, and introduces no new network egress. git rev-parse --short=12 HEAD is a read-only local git query. Emitting the real source SHA into an image label is provenance transparency (improves auditability), not a secret leak.

notes: redteam F6 (build provenance). The Dockerfile ARG/LABEL/ldflags wiring and the compose COMMIT_HASH:${SMACKEREL_COMMIT:?} build-arg were already correct; the only missing link was a git-working-tree source in scripts/commands/config.sh. The fix adds one derivation arm (git rev-parse --short=12 HEAD, -dirty on a dirty tree, unknown fallback outside a git checkout) gated by [[ -z "${SMACKEREL_COMMIT+set}" ]] so a CI export wins. Verified statically via a config-generator regression (no full self-hosted image build per the finding). The wiring change affects only future builds; the already-running images keep revision=unknown until rebuilt + redeployed (bubbles.devops, non-gating).
